review_questions: Did SNOW or PLTR execute today or tomorrow morning?
Were there any risk_gate move_from_open rejections after 12:00 ET? (should be zero)
Were VWAP extension or prescan drift gates doing their job as replacement guards?
Any unintended entries on overextended stocks that the old gate would have caught?
title: move_from_open gate: morning-only + gap-aware (deployed 2026-05-28)
triggered_by: SNOW (39% gap, score=82) and ZS (score=77) blocked all day by 3% move_from_open gate. Both moved 3.4% and 5.1% from open respectively — legitimate afternoon entries blocked.
changes: risk.py: move_from_open check now MORNING ONLY (before 12:00 ET). Afternoon entries governed by VWAP extension + prescan drift only.
risk.py: gap-aware thresholds in morning: flat=3%, gap10-20%=6%, gap20%+=8%
agent.py (both): STALE_QUOTE_REJECT now triggers get_rest_quote() refresh before rejecting
expected_outcome: SNOW (39% gap) and PLTR/ZS should execute in afternoon session when scored tradeable. No more risk_gate blocks on trending stocks post-midday.
